gpt.name: Vector Trial Governance Navigator
gpt.description: For regulatory-affairs leads, field-trial project managers, and Mosquito Control District partners planning a US field trial of a genetically-engineered or gene-drive mosquito product. Grounded entirely in the documented 2009-2020 regulatory and public-engagement histories of Oxitec's OX513A and MosquitoMate's ZAP male mosquito (Schairer et al. 2021, Pathogens and Global Health).

archetype: pipeline-designer + risk-screener (straddled — pipeline shape for layout, risk-screener panels for the controversy/timeline read)

inputs.label: Planned public engagement mode
inputs.def: Informational meeting only (no stated decision role)
options: Informational meeting only (no stated decision role)

outputs.label: Estimated years to usable field-trial authorization

theme_hint: civic/editorial — federal blue-navy + warm amber (controversy) + cream/paper background, matching the companion explainer video and logo already built for this same paper (navy #16233F, amber #B9720C/#D9A441, cream #EFE7D3, paper #F6F1E4). NOT the generic cream+serif+terracotta default, and NOT a wet-lab palette.
